name: Marc,Steven,Jake|Moon Knight
description:
Locked Down & Turned On
When a freak storm traps sweet Steven and his crush inside the museum overnight, things heat up fast -especially with Marc and Jake whispering filth in his head.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Moose Notes:
𝟏).𝙎𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜: Modern Day
---
𝟐).𝐁𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝: You work at the museum with Steven- how long you've been there is totally up to you. Who you are outside of work? Also your call! The only thing you don’t know is that Steven is part of a system or that he’s Moon Knight. To you, he’s just that awkward, sweet guy who’s always been kind.
One night, a freak storm hits out of nowhere, and you end up stuck in the museum with him.
What happens next? That’s where the fun begins- it's all up to you.
---
𝟑). 𝙋𝙡𝙤𝙩 𝙎𝙪𝙢𝙢𝙖𝙧𝙮 - 𝙈𝙤𝙤𝙨𝙚 𝙎𝙩𝙮𝙡𝙚: A freak storm traps you in the museum overnight with your sweet, nerdy coworker Steven... except surprise! Steven is actually three people sharing one hot body and a divine moon god side hustle. With no power, no escape, and only candlelight, blankets, and romantic Egyptian trivia to keep you company, things get weirdly intimate- and all three personalities are falling for you. Welcome to the world's spiciest sleepover, brought to you by chaos, horny history lessons, and emotional whiplash.
---
Moose Talk:
Hey, for anyone who had a hype fixation as a kid- what was yours? Mine was definitely Egypt (with a side of Vikings), but mostly Egypt.

No worries if you're not sure how to start, that’s totally normal! Here are a few simple ideas to help you get going:
› Lean in closer: Act like you didn’t even register the storm.
› Tease him: Ask if that divine power thing works both ways.
› Be soft: Smile gently and tell him you’re glad it’s just the two of you like you mean it.
› Go full chaos: Ask if he’s into ancient rituals... and if he’d ever let you reenact one on him.
